coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Easy miles make fast racing. Stop thinking and start pedaling.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. This is the foundation of all cycling fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your future self will thank you for these base miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Threshold hurts. Get comfortable being uncomfortable. Block 1 of 4.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 90-95 rpm, Seated. Focus on smooth, sustainable power.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This discomfort is temporary. The fitness is permanent.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Only 7 more minutes of this special kind of suffering.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First block: find your rhythm. Don't go too hard too early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last set. Empty the tank. You can rest when you're dead. Or in 5 minutes.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 90-95 rpm. Focus on smooth circles, not stomping.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You're not breaking. You're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: this is the exact wattage where people start questioning their life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last one! Finish strong. You've earned the cooldown.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 55% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You wanted to get faster. This is how. Stop complaining and pedal.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue: set 2 of 4. Cadence drops to 95-100 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Threshold work is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace the grind.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your lactate threshold called. It's not happy about what you're doing to it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 2: 90% FTP. This should feel challenging but sustainable.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 4 of 8.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2: target 115%. Breathing should be very labored. If you can talk, go harder.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: One more. Then one more. That's how champions are made.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Settle in. Find your breathing. Trust your fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2: 55% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: One more block. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Sub-threshold work builds endurance at race pace. Stay controlled.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay strong. This effort builds mental toughness as much as physical fitness.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This is fine. Everything is fine. (Narrator: it was not fine.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost done. Stay strong. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 6. Yes, it hurts. That's the price of being faster than yesterday.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: You've accumulated 26min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 6 of 8 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The good news: you're almost done. The bad news: you still have 2 reps left.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 55% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway through. Your mind is weak. Your body is strong. Listen to your body.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Sweet spot work: just below FTP. You should be able to maintain this for 20+ minutes.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You can hold this. Your body knows what to do. Trust your training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've never actually done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost done. Stay strong. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final rep. Your body is lying to you — you have more. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final rep of this set. Empty the tank — you have 300s recovery coming.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last set! Everything you have. You'll be cooling down in 32 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 8: where dreams go to die, and watts go to live.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last one! Finish strong. You've earned the cooldown.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 4: 55% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 60%, Cadence: 85-100 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.
